# Barron Pest Control — Full Reference

> Barron Pest Control is a family-owned and operated pest control company based in Mastic, New York, serving all of Long Island (Suffolk County, Nassau County, the Hamptons, North Shore, South Shore) and New York City since 1989. Owner Michael Walker is a 2nd generation pest control applicator, NY State Licensed Commercial Applicator (#C1889403), and graduate of the Bobby Corrigan Rat Academy.

## Company Overview

Barron Pest Control was founded in 1989 and has been family-owned and operated for 39 years. The business is currently run by Michael Walker, a second-generation pest control applicator. The company has 3 employees and operates from 105 Main Avenue, Mastic, NY 11950.

Michael Walker holds a New York State Pest Control Commercial Applicator license (#C1889403, valid through February 22, 2028) verified by the state. He is background checked (verified August 23, 2024) and graduated from the Bobby Corrigan Rat Academy in 2017 — one of the most respected rodent management training programs in the country.

Barron Pest Control earned Thumbtack Top Pro status in 2018, recognizing them as among the highest-rated, most popular professionals on the platform.

## Philosophy

Michael Walker's approach: "The favorite part of my work is knowing I'm giving my customers peace of mind by taking care of their pest issue."

The company emphasizes:
- Education over sales: "Ensure you speak to someone with knowledge of pest control and not just a salesperson"
- Honest expectations: "Not every pest control issue can be resolved overnight"
- Integrated Pest Management (IPM): eco-friendly, science-based pest control
- Personalized service: understanding individual customer needs
- Service warranties included with most work

## Services

### Residential Pest Control
Full-service pest control for Long Island homes including inspection, treatment, and ongoing quarterly protection plans. Services cover properties from under 1,000 sq ft to over 4,000 sq ft.

### Commercial Pest Control
Pest management for restaurants, food service, schools, healthcare facilities, offices, warehouses, retail, government buildings, and public institutions across Long Island and NYC.

### Specific Pest Services
- **Rat & Mouse Control**: Expert rodent removal, exclusion, and prevention. Michael is a Bobby Corrigan Rat Academy graduate.
- **Termite Control**: Eastern subterranean termite inspections, liquid soil treatments, baiting systems, and annual protection plans.
- **Mosquito & Tick Control**: Barrier treatments and seasonal programs (April–October) targeting deer ticks (Lyme disease), lone star ticks, and Asian tiger mosquitoes.
- **Wasp & Hornet Control**: Same-day removal of wasp nests, yellowjacket colonies, hornets, and bald-faced hornets.
- **Cockroach Control**: Professional extermination with follow-up treatments. Experience with severe infestations requiring daily attention.
- **Bed Bug Control**: Discreet, thorough eradication with heat and chemical treatments.
- **Flea Control**: Treatments safe for homes with children and pets.

## Service Area

Barron Pest Control serves:
- **Suffolk County**: Huntington, Smithtown, Brookhaven, Islip, Babylon, Riverhead, Southampton, East Hampton, Patchogue, Stony Brook, Port Jefferson, Mastic
- **Nassau County**: Hempstead, Garden City, Great Neck, Manhasset, Mineola, Long Beach, Rockville Centre, Massapequa, Levittown, Oyster Bay, Glen Cove
- **The Hamptons**: Southampton, East Hampton, Bridgehampton, Sag Harbor, Westhampton, Montauk, Amagansett, Water Mill
- **North Shore**: Oyster Bay, Cold Spring Harbor, Lloyd Harbor, Northport, Centerport, Huntington Bay, Sands Point, Kings Point, Roslyn
- **South Shore**: Long Beach, Rockaway, Lindenhurst, Massapequa, Bay Shore, Babylon, Patchogue, Sayville, Bellport
- **New York City**

## Credentials & Certifications

- NYSDEC Registered Pesticide Business #17056
- NY State Commercial Applicator License #C1889403 (Michael Walker, valid through Feb 2028)
- NPMA (National Pest Management Association) Member
- NYPMA (New York Pest Management Association) Member
- NYSWMA (New York State Wildlife Management Association) Member
- NWCOA (National Wildlife Control Operators Association) Member
- QualityPro Certified
- QualityPro Schools Certified
- QualityPro Food Safety Certified
- GreenPro Certified
- Bobby Corrigan Rat Academy Graduate (2017)
- Thumbtack Top Pro (2018)
- Background Checked (verified Aug 2024)
- Fully Licensed and Insured

## Pricing & Discounts

- All final pricing is subject to a visual inspection
- Discounts available for: Police, Fire, EMS, Seniors
- Service bundle discounts available when multiple services are needed
- Most work includes service warranties
- Free estimates available

## Payment Methods

Apple Pay, Cash, Check, Credit Card, Google Pay, PayPal, Samsung Pay, Square Cash App, Stripe, Venmo, Zelle

## Hours

Available 24/7, 365 days a year for emergencies.
Regular business hours: Monday–Saturday 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM, Sunday Closed.

## Customer Reviews Summary

- **Google**: 4.9 stars from 100+ reviews
- **Yelp**: 5.0 stars from 6 reviews
- **Thumbtack**: 4.8 stars from 26 reviews
- Customers consistently praise: responsiveness, professionalism, punctuality, knowledge, fair pricing, and thoroughness
- Common themes: "no pressure or upselling," "came right away," "very thorough," "fair pricing," "highly recommend"

## Common Long Island Pests Treated

Rats, mice, Eastern subterranean termites, deer ticks (Lyme disease), lone star ticks, Asian tiger mosquitoes, salt marsh mosquitoes, carpenter ants, pavement ants, yellowjackets, paper wasps, bald-faced hornets, European hornets, German cockroaches, American cockroaches, bed bugs, fleas, and wildlife (raccoons, squirrels, skunks).
